## Summary
Brief description of what this PR accomplishes.

## Problem
What problem does this solve?

## Issue
Link the issue if it closes one: `Closes #123`

## Solution
How does this fix it? What's the approach?

## Changes
- **File/Module**: What changed and why
- **File/Module**: What changed and why

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing done (describe)
- [ ] No breaking changes

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows repo style (`cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy`)
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`cargo test`)
- [ ] Related logic is wired in (not just library code)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in code

## Notes
Any edge cases, performance considerations, or follow-up work?
